caption: A man with dark hair tied back and wearing glasses performs in front of a ribbed, light-brown wall. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a black vest, and a decorative red and white garment worn under the vest. He stands behind a microphone on a boom stand and appears to be singing, with his mouth open and eyes occasionally closing. In the foreground, the tops of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. The word "ORCA" is printed in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to sing, and his right arm moves slightly near the bottom of the frame.
